findings.detail: No obvious labels or guidance around what the 4 templates and 3 color palettes change, so it may take a little guessing.
findings.proposed_solution: Add plain-language labels under each template and palette, like 'more elegant', 'warmer', or 'best for wellness services'.

findings.detail: The chat box accepts text, but it is not clear what happened after sending because the input cleared.
findings.proposed_solution: Show a simple confirmation after chat messages and save, such as 'Done' or 'Your change was applied'.

findings.detail: There is a save button, but with no edits made it is hard to tell whether it confirms anything useful for a non-technical person.
findings.proposed_solution: Add a short first-time hint near the device toggle and template switcher explaining how to preview desktop vs mobile and how to choose a style.

warnings.detail: No obvious labels or guidance around what the 4 templates and 3 color palettes change, so it may take a little guessing.
The chat box accepts text, but it is not clear what happened after sending because the input cleared.
There is a save button, but with no edits made it is hard to tell whether it confirms anything useful for a non-technical person.
